description: Onfleet provides last-mile delivery management software for dispatching, routing, driver operations, and customer delivery tracking. Its platform lets organizations manage tasks, workers, recipients, and related delivery workflows.
summary: Onfleet exposes a REST API at `https://onfleet.com/api/v2`, authenticated with organization API keys via HTTP Basic auth; no public GraphQL API, MCP server, or CLI surfaced in its developer docs.
